Class DataHandler

java.lang.Object
cz.cuni.mff.java.DataHandler
public class DataHandler extends Object
Utility class for handling dataset loading, splitting, and exporting training metrics and ROC data from a (almost always) provided SimpleNN model.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    DataHandler.DataSet
    Container for raw input features and corresponding class labels.
    static class 
    DataHandler.SplitData
    Container for split training and test datasets.

  • Constructor Details

    • DataHandler

      public DataHandler()

  • Method Details

    • loadData

      public static DataHandler.DataSet loadData(String path)
      Loads CSV-formatted data from the given file path. The method assumes the first row is a header, skips it, and:
      • Ignores the first column (e.g., an index or ID)
      • Treats the last column as the target class label
      Parameters:
      path - path to the CSV file
      Returns:
      a DataHandler.DataSet containing input vectors and labels
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the file cannot be read

    • trainTestSplit

      public static DataHandler.SplitData trainTestSplit(DataHandler.DataSet data, double trainRatio, long seed)
      Randomly splits the dataset into training and testing subsets using a fixed seed.
      Parameters:
      data - the full dataset
      trainRatio - ratio of data to use for training (0–1)
      seed - random seed to ensure reproducibility
      Returns:
      a DataHandler.SplitData object with train/test splits

    • saveMetrics

      public static void saveMetrics(SimpleNN model, String filename)
      Exports training metrics from a model to a CSV file. Each row corresponds to an epoch with values for loss, accuracy, precision, and recall.
      Parameters:
      model - the SimpleNN model to extract history from
      filename - path to save the metrics CSV
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if writing the file fails

    • saveRocData

      public static void saveRocData(SimpleNN model, String filename)
      Saves true labels and predicted scores from a model for ROC curve plotting. Outputs two columns: true label and predicted probability for class 2.
      Parameters:
      model - the SimpleNN model to extract ROC data from
      filename - path to save the ROC CSV
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if writing the file fails
